---
title: Hackathon positioning
description: Why TakPay fits an agentic stablecoin hackathon narrative.
---

# Hackathon positioning

TakPay is positioned as agentic stablecoin payment infrastructure.

## Core narrative

Stablecoin commerce needs more than raw transfers. Merchants need invoices, verification, receipts, webhooks, settlement, and intelligent decisioning.

TakPay combines these pieces into a single payment flow on Arc.

## Differentiators

- Stablecoin-first checkout
- Arc-based USDC payment flow
- Backend on-chain verification
- AI payment intelligence layer
- Circle Developer-Controlled Wallet settlement
- Webhook integration for external systems
- Security-minded invoice verification

## Demo path

1. Open landing page
2. Connect wallet
3. Create invoice
4. Open payment link
5. Pay or paste tx hash
6. Watch invoice become paid
7. Open receipt
8. Show agent dashboard and decision log
9. Show Circle settlement concept
